raw_text:
74. Digital Tooling Engineer

Job Summary  
Integrates digital technolog ies into tooling design, manufacturing, and maintenance to 
improve efficiency, traceability, and performance.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Implement digital tools for tooling lifecycle management  
• Integrate CAD/CAM, PLM, and IoT systems  
• Monitor tool performance using digital dashboards  
• Improve data visibility and traceability  
• Support digital transformation initiatives  
• Collaborate with IT and manufacturing teams  
Required Skills  
• CAD/CAM and PLM systems knowledge  
• Basic IoT and data anal ytics understanding  
• Tooling and manufacturing process expertise  
• Problem -solving and digital mindset  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Mechatronics / Production  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹40,000 – ₹90,000 per month
